description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages stylecheck and test, using a cache at path cache (untracked) and global variables COURSIER_CACHE, DOCKER_DRIVER, SAST_EXCLUDED_PATHS, SAST_JAVA_VERSION, and include the SAST.gitlab-ci.yml template. In the stylecheck stage add a job named "check style and formatting" that runs on image registry.gitlab.com/kpmeen/docker-scala-sbt:scala_2.13_jdk11 and executes `sbt clean scalastyle scalafmt` followed by `git diff --exit-code || (echo "ERROR Code formatting check failed, see differences above."; false)`. In the test stage add a job "run test suites for 2.12" using image registry.gitlab.com/kpmeen/docker-scala-sbt:scala_2.12_jdk11, with a service alias clammy pointing to registry.gitlab.com/kpmeen/docker-clamav (command -m 2M), setting variables CLAM_HOST=clammy and CLAM_PORT=3310, and running `sbt ++2.12.11 clean coverage test coverageReport` then `sbt ++2.12.11 coverageAggregate`, capturing coverage via regex /\[info]\sAll\sdone\.\sCoverage\swas\s\[(.*)%\]/. Also in the test stage add a job "run test suites for 2.13" using image registry.gitlab.com/kpmeen/docker-scala-sbt:scala_2.13_jdk11 with the same clammy service and variables, executing `sbt ++2.13.2 clean test` and using the same coverage regex.
